```{=html}
<div style="width:84%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;background:#1E1E2E;box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);">

  <div style="background:linear-gradient(180deg,#3A3950,#2A2940);padding:0.5em 0.85em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;">
   <span style="width:0.55em;height:0.55em;border-radius:50%;background:#FF5F56;"></span>
   <span style="width:0.55em;height:0.55em;border-radius:50%;background:#FFBD2E;"></span>
   <span style="width:0.55em;height:0.55em;border-radius:50%;background:#27C93F;"></span>
   <span style="margin:0 auto;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;">~ — zsh</span>
  </div>

  <div style="padding:1em 1.4em 1.1em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62em;line-height:1.8;text-align:left;">
   <div style="color:#5C6B80;">// install</div>
   <div><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> <span style="color:#FFB84D;">brew</span> <span style="color:#F8F7F0;">install --cask</span> <span style="color:#69B4F0;">claude-code</span></div>
   <div style="color:#27C93F;font-size:0.85em;margin-bottom:0.6em;">  ✓ installed</div>

   <div style="color:#5C6B80;">// enter project</div>
   <div><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> <span style="color:#FFB84D;">cd</span> <span style="color:#69B4F0;">~/code/your-project</span></div>
   <div style="margin-bottom:0.6em;">&nbsp;</div>

   <div style="color:#5C6B80;">// launch</div>
   <div><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> <span style="color:#27C93F;font-weight:700;">claude</span><span style="color:#F8F7F0;display:inline-block;width:0.5em;height:1em;background:#F8F7F0;vertical-align:-0.15em;margin-left:0.15em;"></span></div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.06em;">
  or run <code style="color:#27C93F;">claude</code> from <span style="color:#5654A2;">VS Code</span> · <span style="color:#5654A2;">Positron</span> · <span style="color:#5654A2;">Kaku</span>
 </div>

</div>
```
